not served here · confidence 0.85 · as of 1.48.0

  • does not compile for visionOS (Xcode 26.6 (17F113), XROS26.5.sdk): .dd/SourcePackages/artifacts/stream-video-swift-webrtc/StreamWebRTC/StreamWebRTC.xcframework:1:1: error: While building for visionOS, no library for this platform was found in '.dd — the same commit builds for iOS, so the fence is real

✓ serves it · ◐ with conditions · ✕ not served (proven) · ? not verified yet — hover any verdict for the receipt, click to pin it

Notes

WebRTC real-time streaming: WebRTC transport via the stream-video-swift-webrtc binary companion.

Video calling: Stream's video-calling SDK over a bundled WebRTC binary.

Screen sharing: In-call screen sharing (in-app and broadcast-extension modes).

Voice calling: Audio-only calls ride the same Call machinery + CallKit.

Badges for your README

Maintainer of StreamVideo? These are yours — verified claims, linked to the receipts. Wrong verdict? That's a fix we want; see contribute.

Every verdict links to the exact source line that decides it. How it works

Made refreshingly cool from Paris, France
